name: fp16-accumulation-threshold-math-docs
description: Document Float16 convolution skips in developer testing-strategy guides with accumulation threshold math and per-layer error tables. Use when: (1) a follow-up issue asks to add a Float16 limitations section to a testing-strategy.md or similar dev guide, (2) a plan references accumulation error = n × ε_machine math that was omitted from Success Criteria, (3) a gradient-checking parameters section needs a Float16 subsection explaining why convolution tests skip Float16.
